name: @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-demuxer-wasm
description: Bink container demuxer extension for @tootallnate/ffmpeg-wasm. Includes Switch KB2n support. Pairs with @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-video-wasm, @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink2-video-wasm, and @tootallnate/ffmpeg-bink-audio-wasm.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
